8905.issue: [W8905] Repository contains [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.welcome/blob/master/package.json) files in non-root directories (e.g. /src-admin/package.json, /src-www/package.json). Dependabot may miss updates unless the "npm" ecosystem entry uses "directories: ['**/*']" instead of "directory: '/'"

8906.issue: [S8906] Some Dependabot entries ("github-actions", "npm", "npm") use "schedule: interval: monthly". Consider migrating to random cron schedule ("schedule: interval: cron") for load distribution.

8908.issue: [S8908] Dependabot entry for "npm" has "open-pull-requests-limit: 5". A limit of at least 15 is recommended.

8913.issue: [S8913] No automerge workflow for dependabot PRs found. Consider setting up automerging by adding ".github/workflows/automerge-dependabot.yml".

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/src") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.

9006.issue: [S9006] .commitinfo file should be excluded by .gitignore, please add a line with text ".commitinfo" to .gitignore

9507.issue: [E9507] i18n directory "src-www/src/i18n" found in repository but is not included in [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.welcome/blob/master/package.json) "files". Translations will be missing from the npm package.

0029.issue: [E0029] Node.js 18 is required as minimum, node.js 20 is recommended. Please change "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '16' } }" to "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '18' } }" at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.welcome/blob/master/package.json).

0051.issue: [W0051] "maintainers" attribute at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.welcome/blob/master/package.json) is not documented. Please use "contributors" attribute.
